metadata.description: The handoff-and-promotion shim — session-boundary memory consolidation for Claude Code: replaceable stamped handoffs, evidence-anchored memory candidates, curated-only promotion.

plugins.name: dream-agent
plugins.description: A 'dream agent' engineered the safe way (designed by a 3-lineage blind panel): SessionEnd enqueues, a cheap model digests the transcript delta at the next SessionStart, handoff.md is replaced (never accumulated) and stamped with branch+commit so a stale handoff is refused, and every lesson/long-term candidate carries transcript evidence anchors or is rejected. No continuous dump, no hidden privilege, no auto-writes to your knowledge base — promotion stays a human-reviewed step.
